article_failure_mode: LLM pretraining memory on heavily represented assets and events
evidence: Research uses CPI, payrolls, SPX and NDX—widely discussed historical objects.
current_mitigation: Deterministic numerical code performs the actual fits and tests.
remaining_gap: Hypotheses and refinements were generated with a history-aware LLM.

article_failure_mode: Historical semantic memory masquerading as discovery
evidence: The model could know historical narratives even when fold features are time-ordered.
current_mitigation: No LLM narrative features enter the regression matrix.
remaining_gap: Model/target selection can still be influenced by remembered historical behavior.

evidence: Many P6 iterations, candidate classes, targets and robustness branches were tried.
current_mitigation: BH correction was applied to the final registered comparison family.
remaining_gap: BH did not include the complete conversation-level search history.

article_failure_mode: Walk-forward treated as automatically clean OOS
evidence: The whole historical sample was repeatedly inspected during research iteration.
current_mitigation: Train-only scaling and expanding one-step folds prevent ordinary row-level lookahead.
remaining_gap: Researcher/LLM feedback turns historical OOS into meta-in-sample.

article_failure_mode: Passive beta or regime mistaken for alpha
evidence: Initial long-equity diagnostics benefited from market drift.
current_mitigation: B0 drift baseline and active prediction-minus-baseline overlays were added.
remaining_gap: D0 association still lacks executable attribution and post-release entry.

evidence: NDX D0 return begins at the previous close, before the surprise is known.
current_mitigation: Candidate is explicitly marked non-executable and shadow-only.
remaining_gap: No 08:30+ entry, bid/ask, tick or slippage data.

evidence: Expectation ledger is a provisional scraped historical calendar.
current_mitigation: Strict PIT status is explicitly blocked.

evidence: All reported evidence is historical and was available during research.
current_mitigation: Formula was frozen and further historical tuning stopped.
remaining_gap: Need sequential releases after the freeze date.

evidence: Ticker, event name and date identities were not masked from hypothesis generation.
remaining_gap: No blinded/renamed rerun or low-exposure matched control.
